creator: ghislain@smartix.llc
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #10)

Thanks once again for the pointer, more brain food. Indeed, several references used one article or the other depending on the case. So until someone else brings it up as an issue I would consider it as an issue that only affects me and in that lens, the issue is already fixed. That being said, I will go ahead and remove the changes pertaining to the articles 'an' and 'a' and leave the most urgent changes. For archiving purposes, I will be attaching a third diff file after the clean up.
